'''âr-sh-g-sh''' ('''karashgeshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lob|lob]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-sh-g-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lob|lob]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-sh-g-sh
|-
! Lemma
| karashgeshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirashgeshoko|thirashgeshoko]] || [[word:jirashgeshoko|jirashgeshoko]] || [[word:shirashgeshoko|shirashgeshoko]] || [[word:kirashgeshoko|kirashgeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurashgeshoko|thuthurashgeshoko]] || [[word:jujurashgeshoko|jujurashgeshoko]] || [[word:shushurashgeshoko|shushurashgeshoko]] || [[word:kukurashgeshoko|kukurashgeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thurashgeshoko|thurashgeshoko]] || [[word:jurashgeshoko|jurashgeshoko]] || [[word:shurashgeshoko|shurashgeshoko]] || [[word:kurashgeshoko|kurashgeshoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorashgeshoko|thorashgeshoko]] || [[word:jorashgeshoko|jorashgeshoko]] || [[word:shorashgeshoko|shorashgeshoko]] || [[word:korashgeshoko|korashgeshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorashgeshoko|thorashgeshoko]] || [[word:jorashgeshoko|jorashgeshoko]] || [[word:shorashgeshoko|shorashgeshoko]] || [[word:korashgeshoko|korashgeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠrashgeshoko|thĂŠrashgeshoko]] || [[word:jĂŠrashgeshoko|jĂŠrashgeshoko]] || [[word:shĂŠrashgeshoko|shĂŠrashgeshoko]] || [[word:kĂŠrashgeshoko|kĂŠrashgeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharashgeshoko|thatharashgeshoko]] || [[word:jajarashgeshoko|jajarashgeshoko]] || [[word:shasharashgeshoko|shasharashgeshoko]] || [[word:kakarashgeshoko|kakarashgeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharashgeshoko|tharashgeshoko]] || [[word:jarashgeshoko|jarashgeshoko]] || [[word:sharashgeshoko|sharashgeshoko]] || [[word:karashgeshoko|karashgeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharashgeshoko|tharashgeshoko]] || [[word:jarashgeshoko|jarashgeshoko]] || [[word:sharashgeshoko|sharashgeshoko]] || [[word:karashgeshoko|karashgeshoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
